chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-2699 of 2024 Along with C.P. No. D-4301, 4459, 4628, 4786, 4971, 5116, 5400, 5444, 5649, 5709, 5901, 6029, 6153 and 6347 of 2023 C.P. No. D-209, 210, 498, 782, 1145, 1314, 1625, 1748, 1018, 1899, 2157, 2446 & 3944 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge 11-03-2025 Ms. Navin Merchant Advocate for the Petitioner Sardar Zafar Hussain Advocate for the Respondent Agha Shahid Majeed Khan Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Mohabbat Hussain Awan Advocate for the Respondent No.8 Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Jahanzeb Abbasi, ADC Collector of Customs West, Karachi, Mr. Tariq Aziz, Assistant Collect Customs, Karachi 1. Applications have been filed by the Exchequer in the respective petitions seeking release of security. Per learned counsel for the Respondents, the obligation of the petitioners towards revenue was secured by bank guarantee / pay orders and consequent to dismissal of the petitions, on 12.02.2025, the amount secured and any accretion thereon may be released to the Exchequer. Per learned counsel for the Petitioner, there is no stay in appeal etc., with respect to the matter under consideration. In view hereof there appears to be no impediment to the grant of respective applications for release of security, in the respective petitions, and the same are hereby allowed. 2. In so far as CMA No. 4324/2025 is concerned, learned counsel for the petitioner is given time to demonstrate any error apparent etc. on the face of the order sought to be reviewed. Adjourned. Office is directed to place copy of this order in connected petitions. Judge Judge Amjad PS
